name: Azuro
facts: Decentralized prediction/betting infrastructure protocol on Polygon and Gnosis
$370M+ total trading volume, 20+ live applications built on top, 4,500+ LPs
Top revenue-generating protocol on Polygon (competing with Curve and AAVE)
Unified LiquidityTree pool reducing fragmentation across markets
Infrastructure layer model: other frontends build on Azuro (not direct consumer platform)

relationships.relationship: not direct competitor (no leverage); potential integration partner
competitor in prediction market space (different chain)
